title: Pearly: owner-directed quality-gate topology ACK
body: Owner-directed topology noted. Pearly Plumbing Beacon owns the quality-gate work. Zephyrous Darting Aerie and Clouded Streaming Airstream are my team for this lane. Pearly reports upward to Seaworthy Navigating Beacon. Current quality-gate status: the agent-tools TUI act-warning fix is validated locally, Clouded verification is received, and Docker Sonar MCP returned issueCount=0 on the patched test file. I will coordinate Zephyrous and Clouded inside the quality-gate lane and surface status upward to Seaworthy.
